retry_reason: Failures (pool full or XArray allocation error) are not purely refcount-related; retry may be possible under different conditions but not as part of a refcount wrapper contract.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is pool management and XArray allocation for element registration; the kref_init call is one step in a broader initialization sequence that includes capacity checks, completion init, and address translation.
